nasb.text: If his offering is a burnt offering from the herd, he shall offer it, a male without defect; he shall offer it at the doorway of the tent of meeting, that he may be accepted before the Lord.

esv.text: “If his offering is a burnt offering from the herd, he shall offer a male without blemish. He shall bring it to the entrance of the tent of meeting, that he may be accepted before the Lord.

cnv.text: 他的供物若是獻牛作燔祭，就要把一頭沒有殘疾的公牛，牽到會幕門口，就可以在耶和華面前蒙悅納。

ccb.text: 如果用牛作燔祭，必须用毫无残疾的公牛，在会幕门口献上，便可蒙耶和华悦纳。
